introSection: Kid's Coaster (Japanese: キッズコースター) was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Nara Dreamland in Nara, Nara, Japan.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Pink track and white supports. The lower supports where coloured green.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train was designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Kid's Coaster (Japanese: キッズコースター) was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Nara Dreamland in Nara, Nara, Japan.



Pink track and white supports. The lower supports where coloured green.

The train was designed to resemble a caterpillar.
